data.title: Ecommerce Trends: 5 holiday shopping shifts that mattered during the Cyber 5
data.description: For a new generation of consumers holiday shopping journeys are beginning in new places, with ecommerce recommendations on social media and AI platforms as important as it has ever been.

data.title: Estée Lauder taps Shopify to speed ecommerce transformation
data.description: The company said the partnership — described as a first-of-its-kind for the beauty sector — will build a unified digital commerce foundation spanning direct-to-consumer websites and freestanding stores.

data.title: Signet Jewelers grows same-store sales for third straight quarter in Q3
data.description: CEO James Symancyk noted that Signet Jewelers has seen increasing consumer interest in lab-grown diamonds. They accounted for 15% of fashion sales in the quarter.

data.title: Nike reshapes C-suite to speed digital shift
data.description: CEO Elliott Hill said the changes are designed to “remove layers” and improve execution under Nike’s “Win Now” strategy.

data.title: Cyber 5 online sales set new record as shoppers spend $44.2 billion
data.description: Social media, BNPL and AI tools fueled online sales during the Cyber 5, which includes Thanksgiving and the four days that follow.
